description: Month 2 output-length sweep at the Month 1 operating point of 18 steady open-loop RPS with a fixed 512-token prompt target.

runs.name: m2_output_rps18_p512_o64
runs.response_instruction: Write approximately 64 output tokens analyzing prefill, decode, queueing, batching, and GPU memory. Do not conclude early.

runs.name: m2_output_rps18_p512_o128
runs.response_instruction: Write approximately 128 output tokens analyzing prefill, decode, queueing, batching, and GPU memory. Do not conclude early.

runs.name: m2_output_rps18_p512_o256
runs.response_instruction: Write approximately 256 output tokens analyzing prefill, decode, queueing, batching, and GPU memory in detail. Continue until the requested length is reached.

runs.name: m2_output_rps18_p512_o512
runs.response_instruction: Write approximately 512 output tokens analyzing prefill, decode, queueing, batching, and GPU memory in detail. Continue until the requested length is reached.
